subcodes.first_line: O luminous youth! A few days ago I wrote and dispatched a special letter on thy behalf, and now [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جوان نورانی چند یوم قبل بجهت تو محرر مخصوصی نوشته و ارسال نمودم و حال جناب
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
